name: ibuildos
description: Git-native OKF-SDLC layer for Claude Code: scaffold a project, author traceable requirements and work, and audit the chain — with the deterministic iBuild linter as the gate.

plugins.name: ibuildos
plugins.description: Manage requirements and plan work as OKF-SDLC artifacts. Skills for discover/plan/author, a traceability auditor, and an AI contradiction-checker. AI is suggest-only; iBuild validate stays the source of truth.
